covariance_model: sigma^2_combined = sum_i sigma_i^2 + 2*sum_{i<j} rho_ij*sigma_i*sigma_j; quadrature assumes all rho_ij=0

sampling.icc1_note: wirbel #190 ICC=1 worst corner: N_eff -> N_prompts=128 inflates +-10.91 -> +-54.07 TPS

private.source: stark #176/#191 private_adverse_skew native drop CI [1.87,2.21]% x measured drop->TPS slope

covariance_data_sources.caveat: WITHIN-device only (single pinned A10G, clock locked 1710 MHz). This r multiplies sigma_within=0.056 TPS, NOT the between-device sigma_between=4.864 that dominates sigma_hw (87x). The launch-relevant BETWEEN-device acceptance x TPS correlation is NOT co-logged: the frantic-penguin n=3 cross-device draws carry TPS only, no acceptance. rho(*,hw) is therefore a bounded assumption.

sampling__input_lambda.note: OUTPUT-side accepted-length scatter and INPUT-side lambda_hat are two views of the SAME accept draw (overlap_fraction=0.8929=rho^2). DOUBLE-COUNT if both stacked in quadrature.

sampling__hardware.note: within-device r=-0.496 (n=12) maps to central -0.0057 (x within-share 0.0115); BETWEEN-device rho UNMEASURED (frantic-penguin n=3 has no co-logged acceptance) -> bounded [-0.3,+0.3] on full sigma_hw.

input_lambda__hardware.note: within-device r=-0.496 (n=12) maps to central -0.0057 (x within-share 0.0115); BETWEEN-device rho UNMEASURED (frantic-penguin n=3 has no co-logged acceptance) -> bounded [-0.3,+0.3] on full sigma_hw.

dedup_reading.note: PHYSICALLY-CORRECT fix: collapse sampling+input_lambda (rho=0.945) into ONE acceptance axis at denken's overlap-corrected 5.32 TPS -> 3 independent axes. Smaller than quadrature; the covariance correction's +inflation is the artifact of erroneously summing a redundant axis.

handoff: fern #185's quadrature is valid=False; the cross-axis covariance-corrected combined single-shot sigma is 15.258 TPS (vs quadrature 12.536), shifting the launch LCB by -3.49 TPS; the SOLE measured driver is rho(sampling,input_lambda)=0.945 (denken #187 -- a double-count, NOT independent additive axes; the physically-correct de-dup collapses it to 7.26 TPS); the hardware<->acceptance coupling is UNMEASURED (co-logged trace is within-device only, sigma_within=0.056) and carried as a bounded assumption -> fern should consume the de-dup sigma AND the worst-case 17.04 TPS until land #71's served draw pins rho(*,hw).
scope: Pins the BETWEEN-axis covariance of fern #185's 4-axis launch CI quadrature (are the legs independent?) -- the ADDITIVE-law analog of ubel #148/#169/#181's multiplicative official=K_cal*(E[T]/step)*tau pin. Distinct from wirbel #190's WITHIN-sampling ICC (intra-axis N_eff). Does NOT change the central projection or authorize a launch. BANK-THE-ANALYSIS: adds 0 TPS, greedy untouched. NOT open2. NOT a launch.
